item.title: Commissioner's Roswall speech at the United Nations High-Level Meeting on Critical Energy Transition Minerals, New York
item.description: European Commission Speech New York, 14 Jul 2026 Thank you, Madam Deputy Secretary-General, Excellencies, ladies and gentlemen. Let me begin by thanking the United Nations for convening this important meeting ...

item.title: Closing speech by Commissioner Šuica at the Launch of the 3rd Demography Report
item.description: European Commission Speech Brussels, 14 Jul 2026 Ladies and gentlemen, Let me thank all of you for the excellent event today. We couldn't have done it without all of you, contributing with your insight and exp...

item.title: Opening speech by Commissioner Šuica at the Launch of the 3rd Demography Report
item.description: European Commission Speech Brussels, 14 Jul 2026 Ladies and gentlemen, It is my pleasure to welcome you to the launch of the third edition of our Demography Report: understanding change and adapting to its con...
